text: Initially the app performed well. For the past several months, deliveries have been consistently delayed, with the app displaying 2 minutes for over 30 minutes. While I understand that operational constraints may arise, Swiggy has a responsibility to proactively inform customers of delays so they can make alternative arrangements. This approach would be fair to both parties. Instead, customers are left waiting based on inaccurate timelines, which is deeply disappointing and unfair.
